rationale: The cited paper appears once in a grouped background citation as an example that smaller serving sizes or partitions can regulate consumption. In the citing article, this reference is used to situate prior work on supply-related consumption cues, but the paper does not develop its hypotheses, design, or mechanisms specifically from Cheema and Soman (2008). The citation is not revisited in the empirical sections or discussion as a direct comparison point, so its role is primarily general literature context.
